message: Not a legitimate performance mod. It was made to bait users for a YouTube video.
Merged and improved in #link:[Aetherworks Unofficial Extended Life](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aetherworks-extended-life)

Outdated. Use #link:[Aetherworks Unofficial Extended Life](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aetherworks-extended-life) and #link:[Embers Unofficial Extended Life 1.25.3](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/embers-extended-life/files/6556819).
Has no performance gain and may even reduce performance for some users.

Better implementation of the majority of functionality exists in #link:[Universal Tweaks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/universal-tweaks). If you also want to silence other sounds, you can stick with Bad Wither No Cookie - Reloaded.

patchList.modDescription: Minimally invasive fixes for Battle Towers.

message: Outdated. Use #link:[Bubbles](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bubbles-a-baubles-fork). If incompatibilities occur, revert to Baubles.
Fix already included in Forge / Cleanroom Loader, does nothing when installed.

Better implementation of the majority of functionality exists in #link:[Universal Tweaks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/universal-tweaks). If a feature you're using is not in Universal Tweaks, you can stick with Better Advancements.
Does not provide any meaningful performance improvements or fixes, can only provide a biome blending visual.
Performance heavy and known to cause incompatibility issues with certain mods including VintageFix.
Outdated. Use #link:[Better Questing Unofficial](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-questing-unofficial) which merges the Quest Book and Standard Expansion.
Outdated and has several bugs. Use #link:[Blockcraftery: Refurbished](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/blockcraftery-refurbished).
Performance issues and OptiFine lighting bugs. Use #link:[Hyxcate](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hyxcate).
MCreator mod with numerous bugs in 1.12.2. Use an alternative biome mod.
Outdated and has several bugs. Use #link:[Charset CRE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/charset-cre).

Very outdated and WILL screw up mob spawns in many mods. If you are using Mo' Creatures, it is highly recommended to use #link:[Mo' Creatures Extended](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mo-creatures-extended) instead which removes the dependency.
Recommended to use #link:[Painting Selection Gui](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paintings/files/7156791) instead to much more easily select what painting you want when placing it.
#link:[Fixeroo](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xp-orb-clump) already has a better implementation of this that supports all tile entities.
Crashes with MixinBooter. Merged and improved in #link:[Universal Tweaks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/universal-tweaks) and modern forks of the affected mods.
An AI generated implementation of #link:[FastEntityRender](https://github.com/Meldexun/FastEntityRender). Causes numerous render issues.

1.25.4+ versions of Embers Unofficial Extended Life will crash on multiplayer. Use #link:[Embers Unofficial Extended Life 1.25.3](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/embers-extended-life/files/6556819).
Does almost nothing except move unloadChunk to tick; caches chunks indefinitely which might impact RAM usage.
Future Fireproof has a better implementation and API features. #link:[Future Fireproof](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/future-fireproof).
Outdated and prone to cause issues in Cleanroom Environment. Better implementation exists in #link:[VintageFix](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/vintagefix).
Has little to no performance gain. It is highly recommended to use #link:[FPS Reducer](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fps-reducer) instead for the same functionality.
Will cause incompatibilities with no performance gain. #link:[Universal Tweaks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/universal-tweaks) already has its own Frustum Culling tweak.

Has conflicting content with certain addons and is no longer available on CurseForge and Modrinth. Use #link:[New Crimson Revelations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/new-crimson-revelations) for most of the same content and #link:[Congrega Mystica](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/congrega-mystica) for most of the mod integration.
Outdated and has several bugs. SauriaLib remains compatible with existing mods that depend on GeckoLib 3. Use #link:[SauriaLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/saurialib).
Crashes with VintageFix's `mixin.dynamic_resources` setting. disable `hideUnknownItems` config in `hardcoreitemstage.cfg`to avoid further crashes.
Can cause invisible entities in your world, as noted on this #link:[issue report](https://github.com/iChun/iChunUtil/issues/178#issuecomment-2917948068).

patchList.modDescription: Patch some known bugs from Industrial Foregoing for 1.12.2 as it is officially EOL.

message: Has several dupe issues and can void all bag contents on servers.
#link:[More Overlays](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-overlays) includes a more configurable version of the features of JustEnoughHighlights, but has other features as well.

patchList.modDescription: Fixes modded GUI overlaps with the JEI window.
Adds a large number of Just Enough Resources integrations.

message: Will cause incompatibilities with no performance gain. #link:[Universal Tweaks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/universal-tweaks) already has its own Frustum Culling tweak.
Outdated, has lots of issues, and requires Custom Mob Spawner. Use #link:[Mo' Creatures Extended](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mo-creatures-extended).
Outdated and will cause issues with Cleanroom. Use #link:[Mouse Tweaks Unofficial](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mouse-tweaks-unofficial).
Known to cause crashes, not recommended for use.
Outdated and impacts performance. Use #link:[Nature's Aura Simplified](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/natures-aura-simplified).

Outdated Vintagium fork. Use #link:[Nothirium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nothirium) and #link:[Naughthirium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/naughthirium) or (Cleanroom Only) #link:[Celeritas](https://github.com/kappa-maintainer/Celeritas-auto-build/releases).

Overwrites vanilla spawn rules, sometimes causing players to spawn underwater. Overwrites nether generation using its own methods. Incompatible with all mods that add Nether or End biomes except those that are explicitly supported.
Overwrites anvil methods and breaks compatibility. Use #link:[Universal Tweaks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/universal-tweaks) instead.
Uses deprecated methods that can cause crashes in older modpacks. Use #link:[CensoredASM](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lolasm).
May cause aspects to disappear on some items. It is also unmaintained with numerous bugs and lacks compatibility with other Thaumcraft addons.
Outdated. Remove OpenModsLib and Replace OpenBlocks with #link:[OpenBlocks Reopened](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/openblocks-reopened).
Has issues with VintageFix's 'mixin.dynamic_resources' setting. Use #link:[Ore Stages ReStaged](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ore-stages-restaged).

Use #link:[JSON Paintings](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/json-paintings) and #link:[Painting Selection GUI](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paintings/files/7156791) for a better experience.
Outdated. Use #link:[Patchouli ROFL Edition](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/patchouli-rofl-edition). Revert if incompatibilities occur.
Can severely degrade performance, strongly advised to remove it.
Currently only used by Thaumic Speedup which is not recommended for use.
No longer needed for #link:[Alfheim Lighting Engine](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alfheim-lighting-engine) or #link:[Hesperus](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hesperus).

Incompatible with Cleanroom and several modern optimization mods. Use #link:[Alfheim Lighting Engine](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alfheim-lighting-engine) or #link:[Hesperus](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hesperus) for better compatibility and performance.
Release version is abandoned. Use #link:[Railcraft Beta](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/railcraft/files/3853491) for fixes.

patchList.modDescription: Fixes issues left in old versions of Railcraft.

message: AI generated mod that can impact overall performance. Use Optifine instead.
Known to cause crashes with certain mods. Majority of features are now in #link:[Universal Tweaks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/universal-tweaks).
Does not work with Cleanroom Launcher. Use the Cleanroom Edition replacement.
Known to cause crashes with certain mods. Majority of features are now in #link:[Universal Tweaks](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/universal-tweaks).
Modern Java versions fix the issue this mod solves.
Causes significant lag when entering a world or respawning.
May break text rendering in some mods.

Outdated. Use #link:[籁/Sound Physics Remixin](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sound-physics-remixin). For Forge, use #link:[version 1.1.15 or below](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sound-physics-remixin/files/6723296).
Outdated. Use #link:[Flare](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/flare) as a modern alternative.
If you plan on adding The Aurorian mod, make sure to disable `Acid` and `Rubber` in config.
CRITICAL: Uses a library that has a known RCE exploit. Remove immediately and use #link:[Survival Tools](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/survival-tools).
Outdated. Use #link:[Tinkers' Antique](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tinkers-antique) which merges modern features and backports.

patchList.modDescription: Numerous tweaks, fixes, enahancments and overhauls for Thaumcraft 6.
Improved Thaumcraft cross-mod interoperability and fixes several issues with the Golem harvest seal.
Large scale Thaumcraft 6 integration addon. Highly configurable.
Augmenting Thaumcraft 6 with a variety of fresh and familiar content.

message: Overwrites Thaumcraft methods and breaks compatibility. Use #link:[Thaumcraft Fix](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumcraftfix).
Use #link:[ThaumicTweaker](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumictweaker) for a better implementation of subtitles.
Screws up aspects and has issues with NBT.
Poor implementation, crashes with Thaumcraft Fix.
Overwrites Thaumcraft methods and breaks compatibility. Use #link:[ThaumicTweaker](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/thaumictweaker) instead.
Outdated. Use #link:[Tinkers' Antique](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tinkers-antique) which merges modern features and backports.
Has numerous issues and memory leaks. Use #link:[Tropicraft Legacy](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tropicraft-legacy).
AI generated, it poorly and invasively injects Baubles capabilities into every armor item. Highly not recommended for use.

Broken and abandoned performance mod. Use #link:[Nothirium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nothirium) and #link:[Naughthirium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/naughthirium) or (Cleanroom Only) #link:[Celeritas](https://github.com/kappa-maintainer/Celeritas-auto-build/releases).

patchList.modDescription: A Companion mod for Witchery: Resurrected, patching bugs, adding integrations and introducing modpack maker-oriented features.
